title: Mutant Addition Mod
description: If you use mutant addtiton, you can encounter several colorful mobs.
body:
________________________________________________________________________________________

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bqk2qeVLwiI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

__________________________________________________________________________________________

If you use Mutant Addtiton, you can encounter several colorful mobs. This mode adds various mutations. 
This mod is best used in conjunction with [Mutant Monsters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mutant-monsters). 

[This mode was inspired by Mutant Beast and Mutant More.]




__This mod was created using some of the models and animations from the Bedrock Edition Mutant Creatures. We would like to express our gratitude to [JujuStyle7](https://youtube.com/@jujustyle7?si=Fy_IrJ4DkMi4nZvW) for permission.

__________________________________________________________________________________________

> Friendly Mutation Report

1. Make a case for Mythical A
2. Throw it at a specific friendly mob and wait. 
3. Fight or befriend the 
completed mutants.

____________________________________________________________________________________________

Hostile Mutant Report

1. Make a night b
2. Feed the skeleton a blue orchid and mutate it. 
3. Good luck 

________________________________________________________________________________________

## Story
 An evil group that wants to eliminate all residents and legendary heroes and create their own overworld, Illage, plans to use mutations to eliminate players...

Meanwhile, the residents develop Mythical A to survive against the relentless mutants. 

______________________________________________________________________________________________
